Skill.source: Item:5:Foulborn Asenath's Gentle Touch, Silk Gloves
Item:5:Foulborn Asenath's Gentle Touch, Silk Gloves

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE The Primordial Chain Coral Amulet Unique ID: 01277203402aa53019fcd7c1363a26fb6df21c5bf90c51c617314cddcece9747 Item Level: 80 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Allocates As The Mountain 0.5% of Lightning Damage Leeched as Life You can apply an additional Curse +3 to maximum number of Summoned Golems You cannot have non-Golem Minions 25% reduced Golem Size Golems Deal 32% less Damage Golems have 28% less Life Golems have 91% increased Movement Speed Primordial Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Foulborn Dialla's Malefaction Sage's Robe Energy Shield: 96 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.0909 Unique ID: d3304a65f53ba325ce8c2488eff0a7257b1efd9d19d470c58e1525ac75b69680 Item Level: 83 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-R-R-R-R-R LevelReq: 37 Implicits: 2 +2 to Level of Socketed Duration Gems 5% reduced Lightning Damage taken Gems Socketed in Red Sockets have +2 to Level Gems Socketed in Green Sockets have +30% to Quality Gems Socketed in Blue Sockets gain 100% increased Experience Has no Attribute Requirements {mutated}+1 to Level of Socketed Gems Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Null's Inclination Ranger Bow Unique ID: 8005030dbcc69b488b7b4316dddcbc9ec2a3441bfa5213a2df90639249ec5e1b Item Level: 83 Quality: 0 Sockets: B-B-B-B-B-B LevelReq: 60 Implicits: 0 Trigger Socketed Minion Spells on Kill with this Weapon Minion Spells Triggered by this Item have a 0.25 second Cooldown with 5 Uses +212 Intelligence Requirement Adds 68 to 151 Chaos Damage 12% increased Attack Speed +11% to Chaos Resistance Minions deal 2% increased Damage per 5 Dexterity

Rarity: UNIQUE Maloney's Mechanism Ornate Quiver Unique ID: 36d6e9beede18f3cfeeffe6525df213eb76dcf51d266247d3ac20e4b267c8588 Item Level: 85 Quality: 0 Sockets: W-W-W LevelReq: 45 Implicits: 1 Has 1 Socket Has 2 Sockets Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown 9% increased Attack Speed +59 to maximum Life 5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks

Rarity: UNIQUE Foulborn Asenath's Gentle Touch Silk Gloves Energy Shield: 26 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.7333 Unique ID: 21bac83647be5e7bca10bd9beca2631a9453dc6d19d0b90c2be9543e5404ac49 Item Level: 83 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-B-B-B LevelReq: 25 Implicits: 1 Curse Enemies with Vulnerability on Hit +29 to Intelligence +74 to maximum Life +76 to maximum Mana Non-Aura Curses you inflict are not removed from Dying Enemies Enemies near corpses affected by your Curses are Blinded Enemies Killed near corpses affected by your Curses explode, dealing 3% of their Life as Physical Damage {mutated}Curse Enemies with Punishment on Hit Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Mageblood Heavy Belt Unique ID: d0dbef93261096f74566251bac6867972310291fe19c39fb2e09cfb598bfca7d Item Level: 80 LevelReq: 8 Implicits: 1 +35 to Strength +47 to Dexterity +26% to Fire Resistance +19% to Cold Resistance Magic Utility Flasks cannot be Used Leftmost 4 Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed

Rarity: UNIQUE The Dark Monarch Lich's Circlet Energy Shield: 224 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.0392 Unique ID: 2855f2fb60389b451cefadcdc2133e023b10cd780f420197b81cdd9df8695be0 Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-B-B LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 +2 to Level of Socketed Duration Gems +2 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems +69 to maximum Energy Shield +1 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems +32% to Chaos Resistance 50% reduced Light Radius Maximum number of Summoned Golems is Doubled Cannot have Minions other than Summoned Golems Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Lost Unity Formless Ring Unique ID: 8235e124af111183d45aae02eb4d94cf6244a06d90f755045bbaef01b7c5d13f Item Level: 85 LevelReq: 42 Implicits: 3 5% increased Strength 6% increased Intelligence Pride has 20% increased Aura Effect Grants Level 30 Herald of the Hive Skill +20% to all Elemental Resistances +35% to Chaos Resistance Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Golem Whorl Helical Ring Unique ID: dcdfda425b9dc5539c7d7b7f44d1c37b0635dec45f9cbf5097720c21d1b023f6 Item Level: 84 LevelReq: 60 Implicits: 4 -2 Prefix Modifiers allowed +1 Suffix Modifier allowed Implicit Modifiers Cannot Be Changed 50% increased Suffix Modifier magnitudes {fractured}+25% to Damage over Time Multiplier 102% of Hit Damage from you and your Minions cannot be Reflected 11% increased Cast Speed +74 to maximum Life {crafted}+1 to Minimum Endurance Charges

Rarity: UNIQUE Svalinn Girded Tower Shield Armour: 498 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.45 Ward: 149 WardBasePercentile: 1 Unique ID: 37c23158bb7c7eafa3a4276ac2251c0fce1bd2be0f3676e8ac11963ce8c29c36 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: W-W-W LevelReq: 51 Implicits: 1 +20 to maximum Life 13% Chance to Block Spell Damage +124 to Ward -10% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage -10% to maximum Chance to Block Spell Damage Chance to Block is Lucky Trigger a Socketed Elemental Spell on Block, with a 0.25 second Cooldown

Rarity: RARE Empyrean Song Profane Wand Unique ID: 16f22b9a7d6796f0865bb97a7e9a15250c26fb2c4a2e705cc06242b1d90437e9 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-W-W LevelReq: 78 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Quality does not increase Physical Damage {crafted}Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality 14% increased Cast Speed {fractured}+26% to Damage over Time Multiplier +24% to Physical Damage over Time Multiplier 12% increased Fire Damage +1 to Level of all Spell Skill Gems +1 to Level of all Physical Spell Skill Gems {crafted}21% increased Cast Speed

Rarity: RARE Ambush Stride Warlock Boots Energy Shield: 175 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.5442 Unique ID: 5e6783b4d74938db195e7d53dc8a04bf81b0dfefd5e237dd545b1b870deb4694 Item Level: 87 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-B-G LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 Ignites you inflict deal Damage 7% faster 5% increased Action Speed {fractured}+129 to maximum Life 87% increased Energy Shield +14% to Lightning Resistance Cannot be Poisoned 36% increased Effect of Non-Damaging Ailments {crafted}20% increased Movement Speed {crafted}9% chance to gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill

Rarity: UNIQUE Cinderswallow Urn Silver Flask Unique ID: 265cd9c5ff7f8b6808cda2d0e16c48e0d5566672eea0c47d409ad94c46e7bd08 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 27 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full +11 to Maximum Charges Recharges 5 Charges when you Consume an Ignited corpse Enemies Ignited by you during Effect have Malediction Enemies Ignited by you during Effect take 10% increased Damage Recover 2% of Mana when you Kill an Enemy during Effect

Rarity: MAGIC Dabbler's Ruby Flask of Draining Unique ID: 0194b9757ac5ba45e1aff22101b9cba18166db5f8020db9c7e5141c8b656828b Item Level: 82 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 64 Implicits: 2 {crafted}70% increased effect {crafted}Gains no Charges during Effect 29% reduced Duration 25% increased effect 0.8% of Spell Damage Leeched as Energy Shield during Effect
